name: vat-validator-mcp
title: VAT Validator MCP
description: Validate EU, UK, and Australian VAT numbers for AI agents. EU VIES, UK HMRC, Australian ABN. Required for EU ViDA e-invoicing compliance.

tools.name: validate_vat
tools.description: Validate any EU, UK, or Australian VAT number

tools.name: validate_uk_vat
tools.description: Validate UK VAT number against HMRC with consultation number

tools.name: get_vat_rates
tools.description: Get VAT rates by country for EU, UK, Australia

tools.name: batch_validate
tools.description: Validate up to 10 VAT numbers in one call (paid)
